$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL for editors that read schema declarations from TOML.

include.description: Shadowtree TOML config files to merge before this config. Paths are resolved relative to the including config file; later layers override earlier layers.

profile.description: Recipe profile. Set to "go" or "node" to enable built-in recipes for this config.

shell_prelude.description: Shell code prepended to every script command after placeholder expansion. In sh/bash, a literal command-position @recipe invokes that recipe directly.

env.description: Environment variables passed to recipe commands. Values may use placeholders.

vars.description: Static placeholder values. Use {NAME} in vars, env, cmd, pre, post, for_each, shell_prelude, workdir, sync_out, and log.

^(?!run_id$)[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*$.description: Placeholder value available as {NAME}. The built-in run_id name is reserved.

commandsMap.description: Commands evaluated to produce shared placeholder values.

recipes.description: Named development recipes. Reserved names such as recipes, init, config, exec, completion, enum, glob, go-main-packages, go-modules, go-packages, help, lines, vars, version, __complete, and built-in @ command identifiers are not valid recipe names.

recipe.description: A Shadowtree recipe. Sandboxed recipes run in a disposable workspace unless sandboxed is false.

help.description: Short help text shown by shadowtree help, shadowtree recipes, and shell completion.

vars.description: Recipe-local placeholder values. These override top-level vars and may reference other vars.

shell_prelude.description: Recipe-local shell code appended after the top-level shell_prelude and expanded with recipe placeholders.

sandboxed.description: Whether to run this recipe in a disposable workspace. Defaults to true.

for_each.description: Optional value-provider command. When set, Shadowtree runs cmd once per candidate. Supports the same builtins as argument values, such as @enum, @lines, @glob, @go-modules, @go-packages, @go-main-packages, @recipes, and @vars.

workdir.description: Optional relative working directory for the main command. With for_each, this is expanded per item and may use {item}, {item_help}, and {item_index}.

cmd.description: Required main command. Use {@} in cmd to splice leftover recipe CLI args. Recipes with for_each may also use {item}, {item_help}, and {item_index}.

pre.description: Commands run before the main command.

post.description: Commands run after the main command.

log.description: Recipe log file path. Values may use placeholders, including the built-in {run_id}. Paths must be relative and stay under the active config file directory.

log_tee.description: Whether logged stage output is also written to the terminal. Defaults to true when log is set.

arguments.description: Typed recipe arguments available as placeholders in commands. Positional values and known key=value values are consumed by typed arguments and excluded from the {@} leftover-args placeholder.

recipeProfiles.description: Recipe-local profiles selected with profile=<name>. A profile sets typed argument defaults before explicit CLI arguments are applied.

profileArguments.description: Argument defaults applied by this recipe profile. Keys must name arguments declared under the recipe's arguments table.

help.description: Short help text shown by shadowtree help <recipe> and shell completion.

enumValues: Base-10 integer parsed by Go strconv.ParseInt.
Floating-point number parsed by Go strconv.ParseFloat.
Boolean parsed by Go strconv.ParseBool, such as true or false.
Path string with absolute, relative, and ~/ fish completion.
Relative path string with relative fish completion.

path_kind.description: Completion filter for path and rel_path arguments. Defaults to any.

position.description: Optional 1-based positional index for positional CLI argument parsing.

required.description: Whether the user must supply this argument.

default.description: Default value. Shadowtree converts the TOML scalar to a string and then validates it against type.

values.description: Command that prints completion candidates, one per line. Each line may contain value<TAB>help. Supports argument-values builtins such as @enum, @lines, @glob, @go-modules, @go-packages, @go-main-packages, @recipes, and @vars. @enum entries may use value=help text when help contains whitespace; quote the help side, for example @enum all='all modules'.

command.description: Command string run through the configured shell after placeholder expansion. A string that is exactly @recipe or @path:recipe invokes another recipe. In sh/bash, a literal command-position @recipe inside a script also invokes that recipe. Unquoted {name} is raw text; quoted {name} is escaped for that quote context. Quote free string/path placeholders normally, for example foo "{bar}". Use {name:shell} only when embedding in an unquoted shell word, such as -xxx{name:shell}; use {name:dq} inside double quotes, and {name:raw} for intentional raw text. Use {@} in cmd as a whole shell word to splice leftover CLI args.

shell.description: Shell used for script commands. Defaults to sh.

shellScript.description: Shell script. Shadowtree runs this as <shell> -c <script> and passes shadowtree as $0, unless the whole string is exactly @recipe or @path:recipe. In sh/bash scripts, a literal command-position @recipe invokes that recipe directly; assignments such as FOO="@recipe" and expanded variables do not. Quote free string/path placeholders normally, for example foo "{bar}". Placeholder modes: {name:shell} for embedded unquoted shell words, {name:dq} inside double quotes, {name:raw} for explicit raw text.

syncOut.description: Paths mirrored back to the host checkout after a successful sandboxed run. Missing paths are mirrored as deletions.

logStages.description: Recipe stages written to log. Defaults to pre, cmd, and post when omitted. The cmd stage includes every for_each main command item. Logged commands are preceded by compact boundary lines.

enumValues: Main command, including each for_each item.
